heading: Consolidation, merger, and acquisition of control of motor carriers of passengers
label: 14303 Consolidation, merger, and acquisition of control of motor carriers of passengers
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 11341, 11343, 11344, 11345a, 11348, 11349, and 11351 of this title prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .Pub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 11341, 11343, 11344, 11345a, 11348, 11349, and 11351 of this title prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .Pub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.text: Consolidation or merger of the properties or franchises of at least 2 carriers into one operation for the ownership, management, and operation of the previously separately owned properties.
A purchase, lease, or contract to operate property of another carrier by any number of carriers.
Acquisition of control of a carrier by any number of carriers.
Acquisition of control of at least 2 carriers by a person that is not a carrier.
Acquisition of control of a carrier by a person that is not a carrier but that controls any number of carriers.
The effect of the proposed transaction on the adequacy of transportation to the public.
The total fixed charges that result from the proposed transaction.
The interest of carrier employees affected by the proposed transaction.

children.heading: .—Determination of Completeness of Application
children.label: c .—Determination of Completeness of Application
children.text: Within 30 days after the date on which an application is filed under this section, the Board shall either publish a notice of the application in the Federal Register or reject the application if it is incomplete.

children.heading: .—Comments
children.label: d .—Comments
children.text: Written comments about an application may be filed with the Board within 45 days after the date on which notice of the application is published under subsection (c).

children.heading: .—Deadlines
children.label: e .—Deadlines
children.text: The Board shall conclude evidentiary proceedings by the 240th day after the date on which notice of the application is published under subsection (c). The Board shall issue a final decision by the 180th day after the conclusion of the evidentiary proceedings. The Board may extend a time period under this subsection; except that the total of all such extensions with respect to any application shall not exceed 90 days.

children.heading: .—Effect of Approval
children.label: f .—Effect of Approval
children.text: A carrier or corporation participating in or resulting from a transaction approved by the Board under this section, or exempted by the Board from the application of this section pursuant to section 13541, may carry out the transaction, own and operate property, and exercise control or franchises acquired through the transaction without the approval of a State authority. A carrier, corporation, or person participating in the approved or exempted transaction is exempt from the antitrust laws and from all other law, including State and municipal law, as necessary to let that person carry out the transaction, hold, maintain, and operate property, and exercise control or franchises acquired through the transaction.

children.heading: .—Limitation on Applicability
children.label: g .—Limitation on Applicability
children.text: This section shall not apply to transactions involving carriers whose aggregate gross operating revenues were not more than $2,000,000 during a period of 12 consecutive months ending not more than 6 months before the date of the agreement of the parties.

children.heading: .—Applicability of Certain Provisions
children.label: h .—Applicability of Certain Provisions
children.text: When the Board approves and authorizes a transaction under this section in which a person not a carrier providing transportation subject to jurisdiction under subchapter I of chapter 135 acquires control of at least 1 carrier subject to such jurisdiction, the person is subject, as a carrier, to the following provisions of this title that apply to the carrier being acquired by that person, to the extent specified by the Board: sections 504(f), 14121–14123, 14901(a), and 14907.

children.heading: .—Interim Approval
children.label: i .—Interim Approval
children.text: Pending determination of an application filed under this section, the Board may approve, for a period of not more than 180 days, the operation of the properties sought to be acquired by the person proposing in the application to acquire those properties, when it appears that failure to do so may result in destruction of or injury to those properties or substantially interfere with their future usefulness in providing adequate and continuous service to the public. Transportation provided by a motor carrier under a grant of approval under this subsection is subject to this part.

children.heading: .—Supplemental Orders
children.label: j .—Supplemental Orders
children.text: When cause exists, the Board may issue appropriate orders supplemental to an order made in a proceeding under this section.
